weak_sleeve.leader_decision_reason: leader does not beat current config by the required policy-score edge

ranking_formula.low_price_mechanism_score: mean percentile rank favoring fewer tokenized high-rank low-price entries, lower tokenized rate, and lower max low-price exposure
ranking_formula.outcome_score: mean percentile rank of total_return, sharpe, and max_drawdown
ranking_formula.policy_rank_score: raw_policy_rank_score minus confidence_penalty; small-sample rows cannot rank above the best normal-sample row in the same family
ranking_formula.weak_sleeve_mechanism_score: mean percentile rank favoring fewer weak re-entries, fewer weak themes, fewer weak-sleeve selections, and lower max theme concentration

ranking_policy: 65% outcome score and 35% mechanism score within each family; small-sample rows receive a 0.15 policy-score penalty.
window_guidance: Treat one-window family_rank as provisional; compare leaders across repeated identical replay windows before changing live policy.
